name: Willmar Indoor Golf
address: Near JC Penny Entrance, 1605 1st St S B1, Willmar, MN 56201
about: Willmar Indoor Golf & Cages is a dual-purpose facility in Willmar, MN, featuring indoor golf simulators and a batting cage. The venue offers 6 spacious golf simulator bays with GSPro software and over 2,000 global courses, alongside a 45-foot HitTrax batting cage. It operates primarily during fall/winter seasons (October - April) and is located within the Uptown Willmar Mall. Pricing is per bay per hour, with discounts for groups and special weekly deals.
why_golfers_like_it: 6 spacious simulator bays with bartop seating
Access to over 2,000 golf courses worldwide
Flexible booking options and weekly leagues
On-site bar/lounge with pool tables and dart boards
Special event hosting with group discounts

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar/lounge area; available for private parties
Full bar service available; includes drink tickets with special events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue also offers club re-gripping services and may provide club rentals upon inquiry.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen service available, but outside food and drink policies are not specified on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes 4 golfers on average 3 hours to play 18 holes, with additional time recommended for warm-up.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Willmar Indoor Golf is kid-friendly and suitable for families, with special events like birthday parties and a family day discount on Sundays.
